data.name: Silk and Sabre
data.detailed_description:
🌊 SHATTERED SHIPS. SMOLDERING DESIRE. 🌴

One massive explosion. Two sworn enemies. One deserted island.

Welcome to Silk and Sabre, a high-seas erotic adventure set in the lawless 1700s. You are Captain Jack Hawthorne, a silver-tongued English pirate with a taste for rum and a talent for trouble. After a bloody boarding action goes up in flames, you wash up on a tropical purgatory with the last person you expected: Li Shuying, a high-born scholar-daughter of the Imperial Court.

She thinks you’re a filthy barbarian. You think she’s a haughty ice queen. But in this humidity, clothes don't stay on for long... and survival makes for very strange bedfellows. 🏴‍☠️✨

Silk and Sabre is an Adult Visual Novel built in the world-renowned Ren’Py Engine. If you’ve never played a VN before, think of it as an interactive, high-definition erotic movie where YOU are the director.

  • 📖 Choice-Driven Narrative: You don't just watch the story—you drive it. Every click progresses the tale, and your decisions determine how Jack interacts with the women he encounters.

  • 🖼️ High-End Visuals: Forget imagination. Every tense confrontation and wet encounter is brought to life with stunning, full-colour 3D renders.

  • ⚡ Ren’Py Power: Enjoy a seamless experience with the ability to save at any moment, skip text you’ve already read, and go back to replay your favourite "climax" over and over.

🔥 FEATURES OF THE FRONTIER 🔥

  • ⚔️ EAST MEETS WEST: Experience the ultimate cultural collision. Will you break her icy resolve with your roguish charm, or will her fierce honour be the thing that finally tames your wild heart?

  • 💦 UNCHARTED TERRITORY: From the clear pools of hidden springs to the flickering shadows of a driftwood shelter, explore explicit, high-tension encounters. Witness "firsts" that will stain the soul and set the blood on fire.

  • 🍑 ANATOMICAL CURIOSITY: Put the tavern rumours to rest. Discover the truth of the Orient through Jack’s eyes in intimate, beautifully rendered detail. No more whispers—just the raw, wet reality.

  • 🏝️ SURVIVAL OF THE FITTEST: It’s not all play. Hunt wild boars, build shelter, and keep your "precious cargo" safe from the island’s hidden dangers. A clear head is a life-saver, but a "scratched itch" is a necessity.

  • 🥥 THE TRIBAL WILD: Shuying isn't the only mystery on this rock. Deep in the emerald canopy, a silent, sun-kissed native woman watches from the shadows... and she’s very curious about the "mainmast" you’re carrying.

💖 WILL YOU RULE THE ISLAND, OR BE RULED BY YOUR LUST? 💖

She was raised for the Emperor’s court; you were raised for the gallows. On this island, there are no laws, no kings, and no shame. There is only the rhythmic shush of the waves, the heat of the sun, and the desperate, primitive need to claim your prize.

Are you ready to weigh anchor? ⚓🍓

data.short_description: Shipwrecked with a haughty Chinese noble, Pirate Captain Jack finds that survival is a very naked business. 🏴‍☠️ Abandon honour for heat in Silk and Sabre! 🌴 Explore exotic taboos, raw desire, and explicit encounters where East meets West in the most intimate ways. 🌊🔥💦 Your prize awaits

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
